creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 163059
path with update to 1.12.5

Hello,

attached a patch to bring the port to its current version.

portlint -C is fine.

poudriere test-builds are fine for:
9.3 amd64 + i386
10.1 amd64 + i386
10.2 amd64 + i386
11-current r290334 amd64 + i386

I did a basic runtime test and played awhile. :D 

Suggestion for commit message:

Log:
  games/wesnoth: update 1.12.4 -> 1.12.5

  Changes:
  * 1.12.5 (2015-11-10)
  * Players Changelog: https://github.com/wesnoth/wesnoth/blob/1.12.5/players_changelog
  * Full Changelog: https://github.com/wesnoth/wesnoth/blob/1.12.5/changelog

   Submitted by: Torsten Zühlsdorff <ports@toco-domains.de> (maintainer)
